claim: Elon Musk pushed OpenAI to partner with Microsoft over Amazon based on personality perception (Nadella not a 'tool') and had concerns about OpenAI's competitive position vs. Google as early as 2018.
actionable: Understand that major strategic decisions (provider partnerships) can hinge on leader relationships, not just technical merit; relationship building matters in startup funding.
source_title: New Court Documents EXPOSE the Altman v Musk AI War...

claim: Satya Nadella was an Elon Musk investor in Neuralink, revealing deep connections between major tech leaders beyond their primary companies.
actionable: Recognize that tech ecosystem leadership is interconnected; partnerships involve multiple overlapping relationships and investments.
source_title: New Court Documents EXPOSE the Altman v Musk AI War...

claim: Elon Musk in 2016 recognized GPUs (specifically Nvidia DGX) as critical infrastructure for AI scaling, requesting early units for OpenAI before the generative AI boom.
actionable: For compute-intensive AI projects, GPUs (or specialized accelerators) are non-negotiable; early adoption of next-gen hardware provides competitive advantage.
source_title: New Court Documents EXPOSE the Altman v Musk AI War...
